SAMAccountMetadata.description: Smarter API Account Manifest - Metadata class.

name.description: The camelCase name of the manifest resource
name.title: Name

description.description: The description for this resource. Be brief. Keep it under 255 characters.
description.title: Description

version.description: The semantic version of the manifest. Example: 0.1.0
version.title: Version

tags.description: The tags of the manifest. Used for generic resource categorization and search. Example: [tag1, tag2]
tags.title: Tags

annotations.description: The manifest annotations. Used for storing arbitrary metadata as key-value pairs. Example: [{smarter.sh/test-manifest/project-name: Scooby dooby do}]. The key should be a valid url-friendly string. The value accepts multi-line string values (YAML block scalars) and various scalar types including str, int, float, bool, datetime.date, datetime.datetime, decimal.Decimal, uuid.UUID, bytes, list, dict.
annotations.title: Annotations

accountNumber.description: Account.metadata.accountNumber[str]. Your preassigned 12-digit account number for your Smarter Account in the format ####-####-####. Read only.
accountNumber.title: Accountnumber

SAMAccountMetadata.title: SAMAccountMetadata

config.description: Account.spec.config[object]. The configuration for the Account.

companyName.description: Account.spec.configuration.companyName[str]. The legal entity of your Smarter Account for invoicing and legal correspondence.
companyName.title: Companyname

phoneNumber.description: Account.spec.configuration.phoneNumber[str]. The primary phone number for the Account.
phoneNumber.title: Phonenumber

address1.description: Account.spec.configuration.address1[str]. The primary address for the Account.
address1.title: Address1

address2.description: Account.spec.configuration.address2[str]. Optional. The secondary address for the Account.
address2.title: Address2

city.description: Account.spec.configuration.city[str]. The city for the Account.
city.title: City

state.description: Account.spec.configuration.state[str]. The state for the Account.
state.title: State

postalCode.description: Account.spec.configuration.postalCode[str]. The postal code for the Account.
postalCode.title: Postalcode

country.description: Account.spec.configuration.country[str]. The ISO 3166 country code for the Account. Default: USA.
country.title: Country

language.description: Account.spec.configuration.language[str]. The primary BCP 47 language tag for the Account. Default: en-US.
language.title: Language

timezone.description: Account.spec.configuration.timezone[str]. The primary IANA timezone for the Account. Default: America/New_York.
timezone.title: Timezone

currency.description: Account.spec.configuration.currency[str]. The primary ISO 4217 currency for the Account. Default: USD.
currency.title: Currency

SAMAccountStatus.description: Smarter API Account Manifest - Status class.

adminAccount.description: Account.status.adminAccount: The designated Smarter admin user for this Account. Read only.
adminAccount.title: Adminaccount

created.description: Account.status.created: The date in which this Account was created. Read only.
created.title: Created

modified.description: Account.status.modified: The date in which this Account was most recently changed. Read only.
modified.title: Modified

SAMAccountStatus.title: SAMAccountStatus

apiVersion.description: apiVersion[String]: Required. The API version of the AbstractSAMBase.
apiVersion.title: Apiversion

kind.description: kind[String]: Required. The kind of resource described by the manifest.
kind.title: Kind

status.description: Account.status[obj]: Optional, Read-only. Stateful status information about the Account.
